$comment: Static chain manifest for the multi-chain USDT tip indexer (F10, ADR-009). Each entry is overridable via env: CHAIN_<chainId>_RPC_URLS (comma-separated), CHAIN_<chainId>_ENABLED (true|false), CHAIN_<chainId>_USDT (0x...). At least one chain must be enabled at boot; Sepolia is the demo default per spec.

chains.name: Sepolia
chains.notes: Hackathon demo chain. WDK + Candide ERC-4337 are documented and stable on Sepolia.

chains.name: Plasma Testnet
chains.notes: Plasma testnet chainId verified at docs.plasma.org/docs/guides/network-configuration/testnet-details.md (9746, NOT 9745). USDT0 testnet contract is in development as of June 2026; set usdtAddress + flip enabled=true via CHAIN_9746_USDT and CHAIN_9746_ENABLED when published. ERC-4337 on Plasma is provided by Gelato / Thirdweb / ZeroDev (NOT Candide); tipping flow defaults to Sepolia.
